flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northeast Texas Community College rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (53.9% → 72.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northeast Texas Community College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 (19.3% → 22.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northeast Texas Community College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $5.6k).
